description:
Phase 1C of bl-f021, sibling of bl-203e (Phase 1A, archived) and bl-e802 (Phase 1B). Filed 2026-05-25 when bl-203e was split; revised 2026-05-25.

## Scope

Per SPEC-clone-layout §8, §14.

### Implements

1. **`bl claim` worktree relocation** (§8, §14.13).
   - `git worktree add` against `~/.local/state/balls/worktrees/<nested-clone-path>/<bl-id>/`.
   - On a legacy-detected clone, the legacy `.balls-worktrees/<bl-id>/` path is preserved (until Phase 2 migrate moves them).
   - `worktree::link_shared_state` updates to point the in-worktree symlinks at the XDG tracker checkout when XDG.

2. **Remaining test migration.** Every test that asserts `.balls-worktrees/` paths or directly pokes the worktree directory updates to the XDG path. ~25–35 tests, mostly in `tests/claim.rs`, `tests/coverage_claim.rs`, `tests/close_drop*.rs`, `tests/review*.rs`. Reuse the Phase-1A helpers (`bl_xdg`, `fresh_clone_into`, etc.) from `tests/conformance_xdg_layout.rs`.

3. **Remaining §14 conformance tests.**
   - §14.13 (worktrees relocated).
   - §14.14 read-only (bl doctor surfaces orphaned per-clone state on moved clone; the `--rebind-path` action is a follow-up).
   - §14.19 full gate (no main commits across the full `init`/`create`/`claim`/`review`/`close` lifecycle on a post-migration clone — needs both 1B's init flip and 1C's claim relocation in place).
   - §14.20 (hand-operable join — exercises the §10 shell sequence end-to-end now that init, claim, and discover all line up).

4. **Legacy warning ergonomics audit.** Phase 1A's `emit_legacy_warning` fires on every `bl` invocation against a pre-XDG clone. After 1B + 1C land and `bl migrate` (Phase 2) is the suggested escape, evaluate whether the warning needs rate-limiting (once per day via a marker under the per-clone tree) or whether the noise is the point. Defer until real users dogfood the warning's cadence.

### Explicitly NOT in scope

- `bl migrate` command — Phase 2 (bl-717e).
- `bl repair --rebind-path` action — follow-up, called out in §14.14.
- `min_bl_version` bump — Phase 4.
- SPEC-forge-gated-delivery §5 cross-doc rename — lands with Phase 2.

## Dependencies

Hard depends on bl-203e and bl-e802 (Phase 1A read + Phase 1B init both landed).
title: Phase 1C: bl claim XDG worktree + remaining test migration
